text.title: Docker Compose (CI/CD) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Docker Compose (CI/CD) end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: inventory-services
step.action: List every service + its current ports + healthcheck.

step.name: draft-override
step.action: Write compose.ci.yaml that nullifies ports and tightens healthcheck.start_period.

step.name: wire-pipeline
step.action: Add up --wait, test step, down -v --remove-orphans gated by always().

step.name: verify-no-secret-files
step.action: Grep for .env references; replace with env: from CI secrets.
